creator: kuriyama@opt.phys.waseda.ac.jp
text:
A manpage '/usr/share/man/man1/ee.1' has two methods for display "/usr/share/misc/init.ee" in bold face.
First method "\fI/usr/share/misc/init.ee\fR" is displayed correctry but second method "\fI\/usr/share/misc/init.ee\fR" is displayed in which has no root slash.
man-jp@jp.FreeBSD.Org think that second method is simply typo, isn't it?

Fix: 

Change "\fI\/usr/share/misc/init.ee\fR" to "\fI/usr/share/misc/init.ee\fR".
How-To-Repeat: % man 1 ee
It displays "/usr/share/misc/init.ee" and "usr/share/misc/init.ee".
